highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates the bundled engine to Skia m151 and ships a wave of managed performance improvements.
highlights_body: The release pulls in several upstream m151 bug-fix syncs and restores the CPU raster path. A broad set of hot-path allocations in colour conversion, SKShaper, and HarfBuzzSharp are eliminated. WebAssembly support is extended with Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries targeting .NET 11.

bullets.detail: The bundled renderer is aligned with Chrome milestone 151. Multiple upstream bug-fix syncs followed throughout the preview cycle.
Re-enables SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to fix a CPU raster path regression introduced by the m151 merge.

bullets.lead: SKColor hex parsing optimised with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads
bullets.detail: Hex colour parsing is ported to a span-based path, eliminating allocations for callers that already have a span or string-sliced input.

bullets.lead: GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context
bullets.detail: The unnecessary `unsafe` modifier is removed from GRContextOptions, cleaning up the public API surface for callers in safe contexts.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData
bullets.detail: The overload accepting an SKRectI subset was leaking a native handle when the subset was applied. The handle is now disposed correctly.

bullets.lead: Hot-path colour conversions ported to managed code
bullets.detail: SKColor↔SKColorF conversion and SKPMColor premultiply/unpremultiply are reimplemented in managed integer math, removing P/Invoke round-trips on every colour operation.

bullets.lead: SKShaper and HarfBuzzSharp interop allocations eliminated
bullets.detail: Glyph result buffers in SKShaper are read via zero-copy spans, HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder, and SKFourByteTag/HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse drop their per-call char[4] array.

bullets.lead: Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries added for .NET 11 WASM
bullets.detail: Pre-built Emscripten 5.0.6 native libraries are included for .NET 11 WebAssembly targets, enabling the new exnref-based exception-handling ABI introduced in that toolchain.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: WebAssembly Skia build cleanup (dropping the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define), Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM libraries for .NET 11, and a cross-backend golden-image visual-regression test harness

preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly build-warning cleanup.
preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 added the Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM libraries, the managed colour-conversion and SKShaper performance ports, SKColor span overloads, the SKImage native-leak fix, and several upstream m151 bug-fix syncs.

harfbuzz_summary: Eliminates per-call allocations in Buffer.AddUtf8 (pooled UTF-8 encoding) and Tag.Parse (char[4] array), and adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM native libraries for HarfBuzzSharp.
